zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell Meinell於1198年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾笛卡爾 達爾比時，她的父親Robert Meynell26歲，母親Emma Malebisse14歲。她於1219年與Sewallis de Shirley II在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1228年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Meinell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German Meixl or Meixel: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with mag- ‘strength’ or māg ‘kinsman’ as the first element.

variants.name: Meixsell
meanings: Variant of   Meixell  , a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Mikesell
meanings: History: Andreas Meixel or Meissel came to Lancaster County, PA, c. 1715from Leimen, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell Meinell was born in 1198, in Old Dalby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Meynell, was 26 and her mother, Emma Malebisse, was 14. She married Sewallis de Shirley II in 1219, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1228, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

Elle a épousé Sewallis de Shirley II en 1219, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1228, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell Meinellが1198年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアオルド ダルビーで生まれた時，父Robert Meynellは26歳，母Emma Malebisseは14歳であった。1219年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSewallis de Shirley IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1228年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Meinell(이)가 1198년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드 다비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Meynell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Malebisse(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sewallis de Shirley II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabell Meinell родилась в 1198 г. в местности олд далби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Meynell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Malebisse, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sewallis de Shirley II в 1219 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1228 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
